author: codex-agent

patch.value:
Focused coverage plan:
- tests/unit/init-command.spec.ts: helper-level present/missing/outdated detection, writer idempotence, AGENTS-only, CLAUDE-only, both files, absent files, and TTY-decline/add state transitions.
- tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts: agent_guidance defaults, schema migration from missing state, deterministic serialization key order, and persistence of declined metadata.
- tests/unit/config-command.spec.ts if config key is added: inspect/reset behavior and settings write op.
- tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts and tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts: init flag/help/contract visibility.
- tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts: JSON key ordering for any new init result field, non-interactive init does not hang, and explicit add/status behavior works in a temp repository.
- Use node scripts/run-tests.mjs so PM_PATH and PM_GLOBAL_PATH remain sandboxed.
Add regression coverage for pm init agent guidance workflows
Cover AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md guidance detection, approval, decline persistence, later explicit add, non-interactive behavior, output shape, settings serialization, contracts, and release-readiness help.

All new behavior has focused unit and integration coverage; non-interactive init regression proves no prompt hang; JSON output ordering remains deterministic; linked focused command passes; full coverage remains 100 percent when the implementation closes.
